mapper.select: SELECT se.event_date AS eventDate, se.stock_code AS stockCode, se.event_type AS eventType, se.title, se.detail FROM stock_events se WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM holdings_replica hr WHERE hr.stock_code = se.stock_code AND hr.user_id = #{userId} ) AND se.event_date >= #{from} AND se.event_date <= #{to} ORDER BY se.event_date ASC, se.event_type ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_events (stock_code, event_type, event_date, title, detail) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{eventType}, #{eventDate}, #{title}, #{detail}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), detail = VALUES(detail), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
